folio.label: 7r
folio.l: For he was Epioås , owen sone

note.notetxt: The abbreviation here is not clear. Could it be a corrections? To be double checked,ODR

folio.l: That held opynyou~ , that pleyn delit´
Was verray , felicite parfyt´
An housholdere , and æ a gret was he
The grettest , of al his contre
His brede his ale , was alwey after one
A betir wyned man , was nowher none
W oute bake mete , was neuäe his hous
Of fyssú and flescú , and æ so plentenous
It sewed in his hous , of mete and drynke
Of alle deyntes , æ eny man coude thynke
After the sondry sesons , of the ©ere
So chaunged he his mete , & his sopere
Ful many a fat ¹tricú had he in mue
And many a breme , & many a luce in stue
Wo was his coke , but if his sauce were
Poynant and sharp~ , and redy al his gere
His table durmau , in his haÂ alwey
Stod redy couäed , al the long day
At the sessiones , there was he lord and sire
Ful often tyme , he was knygút of the shire
And an Anlaas , and a Gipciere al of silk
Heng at his girdil , as whyt as morwe mylk´
A sherewe had he be , and a Countoå
Was nowher swich , a worthy vauasoå
An haberdassher , and a Carpenter
A Webbere a digúe , and a tapicer
And they were clothed , alle in oo lyuäe
Of a solempne , and gret fratänite
Ful fressú and newe , her gere pyked was
Here knywes were nou©t , chaped w bras
But al w siluer , wrou©t ful clene and wele
Here Girdeles , and here pouches , euäydele
Wel semed ich of hem , a fair Burgeys
To sitte in the ©ildehalle , vp on æe heye deys
Euäycú for the wysdom , that he can
Was shaply to be , an Alderman
For catel hadden they I nougú , and rent
And eke here wyues , wold it wel assent
And ellis serteyn , they weren to blame
It is ful feyr , to be cleped Madame
And go to the vigiles , al byfore
